raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Assembly Bill 3242 allows involuntary hold assessments to be conducted using telehealth.",
    "The bill aims to make mental health treatment more accessible for Californians during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "AB 3242 is expected to drastically reduce wait times for patients needing mental health assessments.",
    "The bill seeks to eliminate travel time for county designated evaluators conducting mental health assessments.",
    "Emergency departments in California saw 6,600 people per day with a behavioral health diagnosis in 2018.",
    "Wait times for in-person assessments contribute to strain on the behavioral health system.",
    "The law aims to improve access to mental health assessments and treatment for individuals experiencing acute behavioral health episodes.",
    "NAMI California emphasizes the increasing need for mental health care, especially for communities of color, during the pandemic.",
    "The bill is cosponsored by NAMI California and the California Hospital Association to make mental health assessments quicker and more accessible.",
    "The legislation allows the use of telehealth to improve response times to emergency department requests for mental health evaluations."
  ]
}
```
